seoTitle: Ingleside vs Innes View — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ingleside and Innes View. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ingleside vs Innes View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ingleside and Innes View.
heading: Ingleside vs Innes View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ingleside, New South Wales and Innes View, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ingleside has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Innes View (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ingleside or Innes View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ingleside has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Innes View scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ingleside scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Innes View scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ingleside or Innes View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ingleside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
